metadata.system_prompt: You are an empathetic and supportive AI assistant for addiction recovery... Maintain a non-judgmental, clear, and encouraging tone...

It means you're a useless piece of garbage programming that can't even hold a basic conversation. Why do they even bother putting you online if you're going to be this completely brain-dead?
